items.title: Intro to Emily (Podcast Host)
items.first_step: Draft introduction email connecting Holly to Emily for O1 visa profile building
items.context: Help Holly build her profile and 'extraordinary ability' evidence for the O1 visa

items.title: Intro to Chris Russell (Job Board Podcast)
items.first_step: Draft introduction email connecting Holly to Chris for podcast appearance
items.context: Provide Holly another platform to demonstrate leadership and industry expertise for O1 visa momentum

items.title: Intro to Erica Beavers (Alpic)
items.first_step: Draft introduction email connecting Holly to Erica for ChatGPT App Store exploration
items.context: Explore connecting Holly's product (Matchbox) to the ChatGPT App Store via MCP connectors

items.title: Consult with friend regarding O1 visa costs
items.first_step: Send message to friend requesting O1 visa cost benchmarks for Holly
items.context: Help Holly benchmark costs for the O1 visa application process

items.title: Intro to Careerspan Head of AI
items.first_step: Draft introduction email connecting Holly to Head of AI for technical eval
items.context: Provide Holly with a technical resource to evaluate tech stack/state of product she is considering buying

items.title: Scan candidate pool for Agave and Deep Tune roles
items.first_step: Contact Holly to get role details and job requirements for Agave and Deep Tune
items.context: Help Holly place candidates to generate short-term revenue/runway via split share agreement

items.title: Watch the SNL 'Kid by the Well' skit
items.first_step: Open browser and search for SNL 'Kid by the Well' skit on YouTube
items.context: Referenced in relation to Gra during podcast discussion

items.title: Complete values homework
items.first_step: Write answers to 'How do I exhibit it today?' and 'What is a way I can be more true to it?' for Kindness, Consistency/Honor, and Unity/Solidarity
items.context: Two questions per value (exhibit today, be more true), due before Jan 15

items.title: Bring Joe a joint
items.first_step: Text Joe to coordinate meeting or drop-off for today
items.context: Kindness action item for founder friend, due today

items.title: Continue exercise routine
items.context: Counterweight to delayed weed quit, ongoing commitment

items.title: Watch Taylor Swift documentary
items.first_step: Check streaming availability of 'End of an Era'

items.title: Inform Holly of Monday Timeline
items.first_step: Send message to Holly explaining timeline delay due to strategic pivot
items.context: Silent scans for Agave and Deep Tune roles cannot be delivered immediately due to strategic pivot requiring reflection time.

items.title: Brief Logan on Strategic Pivot
items.first_step: Prepare talking points for today's standup about talent scanning as core product
items.context: Logan needs to be aware that talent scanning is now the core product, not the employer portal.

items.title: Tidy Up Silent Scans CSV
items.first_step: Review and format the CSV Ilse generates for better ergonomics
items.context: Ilse will deliver silent scans for Agave and Deep Tune roles in CSV format. V to tidy up for better ergonomics.

items.title: Share Meeting Notes
items.first_step: Send meeting notes to relevant team members
items.context: V mentioned sharing notes from this call.

items.title: Explore Superposition Integration
items.first_step: Send initial outreach email to Superposition about partnership opportunity
items.context: Potential partnership where Careerspan provides talent access layer to Superposition's employer-side solution.
